Package
Description
org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems
 
org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util
 
  • Classes in org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util used by org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems
    Class
    Description
    PointOfInterest
    An object used by Odometry to create virtual points on the play field that can be used to get important relative information from
  • Classes in org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util used by org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util
    Class
    Description
    Path.Ahead
    Speed modes for the robot that are referred to in the same way as the speed modes for the cyclops in Subnautica.
    Path.traceMode
    Modes for how the bot will follow the waypoints
    Waypoint
    Simple object to be used by Path that contains the basic data for a bots position.
